concept: Devise a survival situation where you're the guardian of the last functional clock tower in a world where time has become unstable and fragmented. Maintain the intricate clockwork mechanisms that anchor local reality against temporal storms that age, reverse, or freeze everything they touch. Venture into chronologically distorted districts to recover specialized gear parts from buildings trapped in different historical periods. Protect the tower from rival factions who seek to manipulate the flow of time for their own purposes as the universe's chronological coherence continues deteriorating.
